author: y4rr
content: Surfaced by phase 2.2 conformance dispatch (#764). mean_dim_inner (ferrotorch-core/src/grad_fns/reduction.rs:1062) only handles the f32 GPU path because backend.scale_f64 is not yet declared/implemented; f64 inputs fall through to NotImplementedOnCuda. The f32 GPU path passes the conformance test. Fix: add scale_f64 to GpuBackend trait + cudarc impl, then mirror the f32 branch. Repro: cargo test -p ferrotorch-core --test conformance_reduction --features gpu gpu_mean_dim. Test #764 keeps GPU f64 mean_dim case marked with #[ignore = "blocked on #788"]; CPU + GPU f32 paths both pass.
